topics.title: Overhead (Top-Down) View Toggle
topics.summary: Press `O` to toggle a flat top-down view of the snake game board, zeroing camera angles and block height; original settings are restored on exit.

topics.title: Gitignore Configuration
topics.summary: Project .gitignore configuration, including ignored directories such as .jolli.

topics.title: README Consolidation and Feature Documentation
topics.summary: Main README rewritten from codebase inventory; extra README files deleted; all shipped features documented accurately.

topics.title: Random Board Shapes and Iron Snake Mode with Level Goals
topics.summary: Iron Snake Mode: optional toggle that carves the board into a random irregular shape and replaces grid-doubling with a cumulative score level system.

topics.title: Bot Pathfinding Fixes: Infinite Loop Prevention and Starvation Timer
topics.summary: Loop guard breaks bot oscillation cycles via revisit detection + confinement ratio; starvation timer ends games when bots wander without eating.

topics.title: Freeze on Death with Loss Reason Display
topics.summary: When a snake dies, the board freezes, the fatal cell is highlighted, a banner names the cause, and any key advances to Game Over.
